name: agent-deck
description: Decks of MCP tools, keys, and self-improving playbooks that bind per-workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Decks of tools, keys, and self-improving playbooks.
interface.longDescription: Bind a deck to your workspace and every session starts with the right MCP tools, credentials, and task playbooks — and playbooks learn from your corrections via a review queue.
defaultPrompt: Bind this workspace's deck and show the deck status line.
